session.assistant:
## All PR Comments Addressed
| Metric | Value | |--------|-------| | Total comments | 1 | | Actionable (code changes) | 1 | | Batches | 1 | | Commits | 1 |
All review threads resolved. No discussion comments required action.
**What was done:** - Added 3 integration tests for `get_remote_ref` in `tests/integration/test_real_git.py`: - `test_get_remote_ref_returns_sha_for_existing_branch` — verifies real `git ls-remote` returns correct SHA - `test_get_remote_ref_returns_none_for_nonexistent_ref` — verifies graceful None return - `test_get_remote_ref_returns_none_for_invalid_remote` — verifies graceful degradation on unreachable remote
**Next steps:** 1. Push changes: `gt ss` (Graphite) or `git push` - If push is rejected (non-fast-forward): Run `/erk:reconcile-with-remote` to resolve 2. Wait for CI to pass 3. Request re-review if needed
